items.title: Perth and WA's south brace for 'rarely experienced' storm

children.content: With a strength only seen every three to five years, the Bureau of Meteorology warns the deep low pressure system is likely to produce destructive wind gusts from Lancelin to Albany, including Perth.

items.title: Police find 11yo boy who went missing in wild weather in Perth

children.content: An 11-year-old autistic boy, who is non-verbal, has been found after going missing from Perth's western suburbs in wild weather on Saturday afternoon.

items.title: As threats against polticians rise, should taxpayers foot the bill for security?

children.content: As threats against elected officials grow, so too is a question in the mind of many politicians — should the public pay for home security for our elected representatives?

items.title: Why are Australians still getting lost and dying in the outback?

items.title: Pedestrian seriously injured as ute mounts footpath along coastal walkway

children.content: Onlookers describe their shock after a pedestrian was mowed down by a ute that mounted a popular coastal footpath in Perth's northern suburbs on Saturday morning.

items.title: Man who claimed mum stole Dreamworld tragedy compensation left feeling let down

items.title: Surrounded by smoke in pregnancy, mothers fear it made their babies sick
